title: dysoxylum kaniense
intro: Dysoxylum kaniense is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, commonly known as the Kani rosewood or Philippine rosewood. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Dysoxylum kaniense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as ointments and salves, to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
